# Incursa Platform

`platform` is the provider-neutral base repository in the Incursa split. Keep this repo focused on shared abstractions, capability surfaces, hosting adapters, orchestration, and tooling that can be consumed by both public and private integration repositories.

Public provider implementations now live in [C:\src\incursa\integrations-public](C:/src/incursa/integrations-public).

## Repository map

- `src/`: provider-neutral packages and hosting adapters
- `tests/`: provider-neutral tests and shared test utilities
- `tools/`: analyzers and helper CLIs that remain repo-agnostic
- `eng/`: package catalog and versioning helpers
- `docs/`: architecture, scope boundary, and repository split records
- `incubating/`: preserved staging area for code not ready for the public package surface

## Primary solutions

- `Incursa.Platform.slnx`: day-to-day solution for the retained platform surface
- `Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx`: build/test/pack solution for this repo
- `Incursa.Platform.Incubating.slnx`: optional staging solution for preserved incubating code

## Dependency boundary

- `platform` must not depend on `integrations-public`
- `integrations-public` and future `integrations-private` repos may depend on `platform`
- provider-specific implementations should be kept out of this repo unless they are being deliberately staged for later extraction

## Package families retained here

Core and capabilities:

- `src/Incursa.Platform/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Access/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Audit/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Correlation/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.CustomDomains/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Dns/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.ExactlyOnce/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Health/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.HealthProbe/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Idempotency/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Observability/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Operations/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Storage/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Webhooks/`

Hosting adapters:

- `src/Incursa.Platform.Access.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Access.Razor/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Email.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Health.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Metrics.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Metrics.HttpServer/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity.AspNetCore/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Modularity.Razor/`
- `src/Incursa.Platform.Webhooks.AspNetCore/`

Shared tooling retained here:

- `tools/observability/src/Incursa.Platform.Observability.Analyzers/`
- `tools/testdocs/src/Incursa.TestDocs.Analyzers/`
- `tools/testdocs/src/Incursa.TestDocs.Cli/`

Published test support retained here:

- `tests/Incursa.Platform.TestUtilities/`

Moved to `integrations-public`:

- `Incursa.Integrations.Cloudflare*`
- `Incursa.Integrations.ElectronicNotary*`
- `Incursa.Integrations.Storage.Azure`
- `Incursa.Integrations.Stripe`
- `Incursa.Integrations.WorkOS*`
- `Incursa.Platform.Email.Postmark`
- `Incursa.Platform.Email.Postgres`
- `Incursa.Platform.Email.SqlServer`
- `Incursa.Platform.InMemory`
- `Incursa.Platform.Postgres`
- `Incursa.Platform.SqlServer`

## Authoritative governance files

- `eng/package-catalog.json`: authoritative project classification and pack/publish allowlist for this repo
- `eng/package-versions.json`: authoritative per-package semantic version manifest for packable projects
- `eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1`: regenerates the catalog from the current repo tree
- `eng/Initialize-PackageVersions.ps1`: rewrites the version manifest from the current catalog
- `eng/Resolve-AffectedProjects.ps1`: calculates changed projects and reverse dependencies
- `eng/Resolve-VersionPlan.ps1`: calculates semantic version bumps for changed packable projects and reverse dependents
- `eng/Apply-VersionPlan.ps1`: applies the resolved version plan to the manifest and `.csproj` files
- `eng/Test-PackageVersionChanges.ps1`: validates that affected packable projects include version bumps
- `eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1`: packs only catalog-allowlisted projects
- `docs/repo-split-plan.md`: classification and split plan used for the extraction
- `docs/repository-split-summary.md`: what stayed here versus what moved out

## Orientation commands

```powershell
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-repo-discovery/scripts/discover-dotnet-repo.ps1
pwsh -File .codex/skills/dotnet-build-diagnostics/scripts/run-build-diagnostics.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Resolve-VersionPlan.ps1 -Base origin/main -Head HEAD -AsJson
```

When tests are involved:

```bash
bash .codex/skills/dotnet-test-triage/scripts/run-test-triage.sh
```

## Validation commands

```powershell
dotnet restore Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx
dotnet tool restore
dotnet build Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx -c Release
dotnet test Incursa.Platform.CI.slnx -c Release
pwsh -File eng/Generate-PackageCatalog.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Initialize-PackageVersions.ps1
pwsh -File eng/Pack-PublicPackages.ps1 -Configuration Release -OutputPath ./nupkgs
```

`Incursa.Platform.TestUtilities` is published for downstream automated test projects. Consume it via NuGet rather than a sibling-repository `ProjectReference`.
